title: Codex for Students
description: Codex for Students gives verified university students credits that extend Codex usage beyond the limits included with eligible ChatGPT plans.
eligibility: Current students at degree-granting universities who reside in the United States or Canada must verify their student status through SheerID.
value: $100, equivalent to 2,500 ChatGPT credits for Codex, valid for 12 months
